name: Yancy
quote: The professional mentorship program is excellent. I have learned so much that my nutritionist business has exploded. I have close to 1,856 clients located in various states. I offer an initial program package that covers 6 months of nutritional guidance, personal training classes, lab testing and nutritional supplements for $5000. After 6 months, I offer a continuing program for 1 year for $3500. At first, I didn't really think that many people would go for the prices that I offered. But, by networking with higher income individuals, my client base has exploded. So much so that I have a waiting list with 478 people on it. My wife quit her job at Marriott and now runs the day-to-day operations of our practice. All of this would not have been possible without the guidance and mentoring from both of you.
headline: Business exploded to 1,856 clients with 478-person waitlist

name: Corinne T.
quote: This program helped me find my first client and gave me the confidence to start working with people right away. Thanks to this program, I was able to build a system that brought in enough clients and revenue to quit my day job. 10/10. Highly recommend!
headline: Built enough revenue to quit her day job

name: Cara H.
quote: Just a few weeks into the program and through Sean's incredible guidance, I sold a 3 month nutrition package!
headline: Sold first nutrition package in weeks

name: Morgan
quote: My business has quadrupled in revenue!
headline: Business quadrupled in revenue

name: Samantha M.
quote: I honestly don't think I would be where I am today without this program. A month before graduating, I was questioning everything — my degree, my confidence, and whether I could actually make a career out of this field. I felt stuck and discouraged. Through this program, I gained clarity, confidence, and real-world direction. It helped me start my own business, find my first job in the field, and believe that I actually belonged here. I never would have imagined getting started in this capacity without it. This experience truly changed the trajectory of my life, and I'm so grateful I said yes.
headline: Started own business and found first job in the field

name: Hannah N.
quote: I also wanted to launch an online business, and I quickly realized that having a network and community is everything. Being able to ask questions and get support from people just a click away has been a complete game changer. The mentorship and the supportive community of other practitioners have been monumental in my growth. I finally feel like I'm not doing this alone. If you're new to entrepreneurship or the nutrition field, please know — you don't have to do it all by yourself. It's okay to ask for help. The only way to become ready is by taking action.
headline: Launched online business with community support

name: Alicia W.
quote: What a powerhouse Sean and David are! Sean is highly motivating and gives you the swift kick to step out of your comfort zone to grow the business you envision. This combined approach is as personal and hands-on as you need it to be. I recommend this program to anyone wanting support to grow his or her business.
headline: Grew envisioned business with hands-on coaching

name: Koren W.
quote: On the business side, Sean really knows his stuff. I love that he is so genuine and honest with everyone in the program. He's a nice guy but doesn't sugar coat his critiques, which I find really helpful. I highly recommend the Professional Mentorship Program if you are aiming to launch your own Nutrition business.
headline: Launched nutrition business with genuine, honest coaching

name: Rachel D.
quote: This program truly prepared me for passing the NANP Board Exam and boosted my confidence in interpreting intake forms and conducting client consultations. Moreover, I got way more comfortable with public speaking, learned so much in the course work, and feel as if I have a vision for my business!
headline: Gained confidence and a clear vision for her business

name: Jade B.
quote: Joining Holistic Consulting was the number one way to find a strong and thriving community of nutrition professionals at all stages of their careers, and build the self-confidence and core framework for heading into the field as a new practitioner. If you're on the fence about betting on yourself, take the bet and join Holistic Consulting. I truly owe so much to the people who design and show up to work this program.
headline: Built self-confidence and framework as new practitioner

name: Paige S.
quote: Joining Holistic Consulting has changed my life. Graduating with a degree does not mean you feel prepared to do the work, have a business, or effectively counsel a client. David and Sean teach real work skills and help you every step of the way. Recently, they recommended me for a job that I got which I could NOT have done without them! Sean gave me his signature motivation that prepared me for interviews.
headline: Got job through coaching, resume help, and referral

name: Savannah
quote: Because of the connection network of Holistic Consulting, I was able to land a fulfilling role in a competitive environment through a referral. I also received support with interview prep, knowing how to differentiate myself, and approaching the interview with confidence. I could not recommend the community enough!
headline: Landed fulfilling role through referral network

name: Jade M.
quote: Thank you for the job referral and for helping me truly stand out during the interview process. The new job is everything I could dream of and beyond. Working with clients this way and having a giant support network has really allowed me to open up and step up to be the practitioner I knew I could.
headline: Dream job through referral and interview coaching

name: Patrick H.
quote: They took time to meet with me to discuss goals and suggestions in regard to the interview process. One or many of their suggestions helped me in landing a job offer. To gather that much support and specific insights without having enrolled in the Mentorship program has convinced me that it would be well worth your time and investment.
headline: Landed job offer with interview guidance before even enrolling

name: Solange M.
quote: Holistic Consulting gives you all the tools you need to succeed! They support you every step of the way through continued nutrition education, practical exam prep, business training, mock consultations, group support, and so much more. All of these areas will support you not only on exam day, but throughout your career!
headline: Business training and support throughout career

name: Linda O.
quote: I found a wonderful job because of this program.
headline: Found wonderful job through the program

name: Dona
quote: I got a job with Dr. Josh Axe!
headline: Got a job with Dr. Josh Axe

name: Cierra
quote: You can start your business tomorrow!
headline: Confidence to start your business tomorrow

name: Alicia W.
quote: It's really been going to local functions, wellness fairs, meeting people and putting myself out there locally — and that's where the treasure has been for me. When it came time to launch programs and put packages together, it was a really easy sell. Done is better than perfect.
headline: Five $5,000+ enrollments in a single quarter through local networking

name: Morgan L.
quote: If you tell me I can't do something I'm going to prove to you that I can. The worst they're going to tell you is no. The best they're going to say is yes and then you get to make money. Just be consistent, be persistent, keep on going — if somebody tells you no, go to the next.
headline: 13-year journey from teaching to thriving workshop business

name: Laura
quote: $550 feels like a monumental investment when you're in the thick of it, but after the results, it seems laughably cheap.
headline: Validated premium pricing through client results

name: Linda
quote: You don't have to be fully ready. It doesn't have to look perfect. You can just start and go and it will work out.
headline: Started before feeling ready and it worked

name: Corinne
quote: I didn't really pick this niche, it just kind of fell into my lap. Just start helping people and you will quickly learn — that's probably not for me or yeah, this is everything for me.
headline: Found her niche organically through practice

name: Lisa
quote: It's just a conversation. Procrastination is more intense because it's something that I want to be really good at and it's something that I really feel is my purpose.
headline: Overcame procrastination with discovery call mindset shift

name: Phyllis
quote: I also earned my credential for BCHN. So that's done and dusted. I'm super happy. I posted my first Facebook post and my first Instagram post ever in my lifetime on purpose. That is in support of my next restart class which is in January, and I've already had one person sign up.
headline: First-ever social media posts led to first class sign-up

name: Amy
quote: My big win is that I overcame my fear of these calls. I didn't really overcome the fear. I'm just feeling the fear and doing it anyway. I still don't know what I'm doing and I feel kind of self-conscious, but I'm here. I'm trying.
headline: Overcame fear by showing up and doing it anyway

name: Lisa W.
quote: I posted five times last week. The first couple videos I had written down ideas and then every day since it's been on the fly. I was surprised I had like a hundred views on Facebook. The critique-peaking was pretty hard at first but now it's just 'nah.'
headline: Broke through social media fear with 100+ view posts

name: Leandra
quote: I actually have another discovery call planned for Friday. My piano teacher's mom — I worked with her and now my piano teacher wants to do it. I did sell a nutrigenomics panel. A lot of moms are approaching me. I've got PCOS people coming to me.
headline: Steady client pipeline through word-of-mouth referrals

name: Holly H.
quote: The fact that I did it, the fact that I reminded me, and the fact that it's 80% there — five stars all around.
headline: Launched nutrition business while pursuing master's degree

name: Danielle P.
quote: That person that reached out to me a few weeks ago randomly on my website — she is a real person. It was not a scam. We did meet last week. She reached out to a bunch of nutrition organizations and three got back to her. And I was one of the three.
headline: Organic website leads turning into real clients

name: Nicole F.
quote: I created an ebook on gut health and then I put it into an AI program and asked it to generate 10 different social media post ideas. Then I spent an entire day trying to figure out how to create a form on Kit. But I figured it out and now I have it on there.
headline: Built lead magnet and email marketing system from scratch

name: Karen
quote: I wanted to get my board certification this year, but with everything that happened — breaking my leg and moving and all that — I am proud that I kept going. Made my business an LLC. I'm kind of just proud that I'm still standing.
headline: Formed LLC and kept going despite massive personal upheaval

name: Mastermind Participant
quote: I'm going to re-ticket myself as a concierge nutritionist. So I priced it like high-ticket. And this lady didn't even ask me my cost and she just signed up. She was like, 'Oh my god.' So I'm selling myself as concierge now and that's what I'm doing.
headline: First paying client signed up at $600 without asking the price

name: Mastermind Participant
quote: Every single person that I'm talking to is paying $8,000 or $8,500. These people are so compliant. They're ready. They want help. They go all-in. I'm not taking another single cheap or free person because they have nothing invested. Charge. It's not just for you. It's for them too, to be invested.
headline: Premium $8,000+ clients who go all-in

name: Mastermind Participant
quote: I had that discovery call with the lady with fibromyalgia and it went great. By the time we got to the end of the call, I don't even think they cared what the price was. They just want somebody to help them navigate. When it feels right, it doesn't feel like selling. It just kind of feels natural. Very easy.
headline: Discovery call closed effortlessly without price objection

name: Mastermind Participant
quote: I've already left reviews for the whole program. I really love the people that it seems to attract — just really positive and everyone is so encouraging and it makes everything easy. Could I have done it solo? Certainly not as easily. And I would absolutely recommend it to anyone who needs help getting their business off the ground.
headline: Would absolutely recommend for getting business off the ground

name: Mastermind Participant
quote: I have a closed group — 470 people with PCOS that I've been supporting. I'm ready to get more clients. The way I structured the first wave is beta clients with a very steep discount. And my next wave, I'd like to do foundational clients that will still get a discount but not as much.
headline: 470-person community ready to launch structured client acquisition

name: Jasmine
quote: People don't know that. Like people just don't know that.
headline: Realized basic nutrition knowledge is genuinely valuable to clients
